name: investing-toolkit
description: Investing research toolkit v2.1.0 — three-layer architecture (Data / Analysis / Report). 5 country-bundled data skills (US/JP/TW/KR/CN), 6 pure-compute analysis skills (DCF, comps, screener, technical, portfolio, macro-regime — Phase 1 per-country classifiers per ADR-0004), 4 report orchestrators (memo, snapshot, portfolio review, screener list) with runtime peer-discovery. 投資調査・美股・台股・日股・韓股・中國股。投資研究工具組。 ⚠️ Claude Code CLI only — Cowork sandbox blocks external data fetches.
